title: Watch this 100x developer use Codex… it’s insane
summary: David Ondrej presents a video featuring developer Pietro Schirano demonstrating use of Codex for code generation. The content emphasizes the capabilities of AI-assisted coding and is positioned as educational material for learning to code with AI.
